person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Hugues de Vergy (1141-1217) is the lord of Vergy from 1168 to 1198, and lord of Autrey and de Mirebeau, son of Guy seigneur de Vergy and d'Adélaïde de Beaumont, daughter of Hugues V de Beaumont.

«b»Biography «/b»
He succeeds his father Guy de Vergy. It is the 5 th of the line of lords of Vergy and descended from Henry I st Duke of Burgundy, Hugh brother 1 st Capet. Duke Hugues III of Burgundy contested his right of lordship by placing the seat before the citadel of Vergy.

In 1186, Hugues de Vergy called on King Philippe II of France who carried the host in Burgundy to defend his vassal. The Duke of Burgundy is ordered to pay 30,000 pounds parisis in compensation for his numerous abuses and to deliver 3 castles as security until payment. Hugues de Vergy is confirmed in his lordship of Vergy which he abandoned to the King of France in thanks for his intervention.

Philippe II reserves the right of lordship on the lands of Vergy. Hugues III of Burgundy revealing himself in the financial incapacity to pay the fine to free his castles, to compensate the churches which he had pillaged and Hugues de Vergy for the damage which he had caused on his lands, Philippe II gives him thanks of the 30,000 pounds parisis and gives him back his castles.

Finally, the dispute was settled in 1199. The lordship of Vergy fell to the house of Burgundy by the marriage of Alix de Vergy with Eudes III of Burgundy.

His son William I first succeeded him.

«b»Posterity «/b»
Hugues de Vergy had married in 1175 Gillette de Traînel, daughter of Garnier II de Traînel and Adèle de Marigny. They had together:

1.) Simone, married to Thierry de Rougemont

2.) Nicole, married to Anséric V of Montreal

3.) Alix de Vergy , married to Duke Eudes III of Burgundy

4.) Guillaume I er , married to Clémence Dame de Fouvent

5.) Hugues, lord of Belvoir , married to Simonette

6.) Garnier

7.) Gui, bishop of Autun

sourceList.title: Hugh de Vergy, Seigneur de Vergy in Our Royal, Titled, Noble, and Commoner Ancestors

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues de Vergy於1141年出生在法國布格o-達雷勒-維吉時，他的父親Guy de Vergy26歲，母親Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne19歲。他於1175年與Gillette de Trainel結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues de Vergy于1141年出生在法国布格o-達雷勒-維吉时，他的父亲Guy de Vergy26岁，母亲Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne19岁。他于1175年与Gillette de Trainel结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1217年享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vergy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Herefordshire): nickname from Middle English verrei, verie ‘true; reliable, trustworthy’ (Old French verai).

Irish: variant of McVerry, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fearadhaigh, itself an unlenited and subsequently voiced variant of Mac Fhearadhaigh, ‘son of Fearadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘manly’. Compare McAree and McCary ; also the surnames Ferry and Farry , from Ó Fearadhaigh.
History: The widow Bridget Very settled with her children in Salem, MA, c. 1634. She had many prominent descendants, including the poet Jones Very (1813–1880).

variants.name: McAree
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhearadhaigh ‘son of Fearadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘manly’ (from fear ‘man’). Pronunciation of this name as McAree led to misinterpretation as Mac an Rí ‘son of the king’ and thus to ‘translation’ as King . See McGarry .

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues de Vergy was born in 1141, in Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Guy de Vergy, was 26 and his mother, Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne, was 19. He married Gillette de Trainel in 1175. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1217, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues de Vergy est né en 1141, à Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Guy de Vergy, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Gillette de Trainel en 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1217, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues de Vergy 1141 in Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Vergy 26 und seine Mutter Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne 19. Er hat 1175 Gillette de Trainel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1217 im Alter von 76 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues de Vergy è nato il nel 1141 nel Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Guy de Vergy, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Gillette de Trainel nel 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1217, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues de Vergyが1141年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルレウレ-バーグイで生まれた時，父Guy de Vergyは26歳，母Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanneは19歳であった。1175年にGillette de Trainelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年に76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues de Vergy(이)가 1141년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 레우레-버기에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Vergy(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1175년 Gillette de Trainel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues de Vergy nasceu em 1141, em Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Guy de Vergy, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Gillette de Trainel em 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1217, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues de Vergy родился в 1141 г. в местности реулле-вирги, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy de Vergy было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Gillette de Trainel в 1175 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1217 г. в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues de Vergy nació en 1141, en Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Guy de Vergy, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Adélaïs de Beaumont-sur-Vingeanne, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Gillette de Trainel en 1175. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1217, a la edad de 76 años.
